name: Gold Tone Pave Crystal Huggie Hoop Earrings
description: Elevate your everyday style with these elegant gold-tone huggie hoop earrings. Measuring 1.2cm in height, these delicate hoops feature sparkling crystal detailing on the front. Crafted with an anti-tarnish finish for long-lasting wear and enduring shine.

media.alt_text: Gold tone 1.2cm huggie hoop earrings with pave crystal detailing on a white background

faqs.question: What is the size of these hoop earrings?
faqs.answer: These huggie hoop earrings have a height of 1.2cm, making them perfect for a subtle, everyday look.

faqs.question: Are these earrings resistant to tarnishing?
faqs.answer: Yes, they are designed with a premium anti-tarnish finish to maintain their gold tone with regular use.

meta_title: Gold Tone Crystal Huggie Hoop Earrings | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop our 1.2cm Gold Tone Crystal Huggie Hoop Earrings. Featuring sparkling stones and an anti-tarnish finish, these small hoops are perfect for everyday wear.
